zh.North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Lawedre於1385年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可時，他的父親Robert Lauder of The Bass I55歲，母親Annabel Fallow35歲。他於1419年與Lady Katherine Landells在英國蘇格蘭洛迪安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年6月在英國諾圖波藍德貝維其可享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Lawedre于1385年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾諾斯 貝維其可时，他的父亲Robert Lauder of The Bass I55岁，母亲Annabel Fallow35岁。他于1419年与Lady Katherine Landells在英国苏格兰洛迪安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年6月在英国諾圖波藍德貝維其可享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Lawedre was born in 1385, in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Lauder of The Bass I, was 55 and his mother, Annabel Fallow, was 35. He married Lady Katherine Landells in 1419, in Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in June 1421, in Berwick, Northumberland, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Lawedre est né en 1385, à North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Lauder of The Bass I, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Annabel Fallow, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Katherine Landells en 1419, à Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1421, à Berwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Lawedre 1385 in North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Lauder of The Bass I 55 und seine Mutter Annabel Fallow 35. Er hat 1419 in Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Katherine Landells geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1421 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Berwick, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Lawedre è nato il nel 1385 nel North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Lauder of The Bass I, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Annabel Fallow, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Katherine Landells nel 1419, nel Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1421, nel Berwick, Northumberland, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Lawedreが1385年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアノース バーウィックで生まれた時，父Robert Lauder of The Bass Iは55歳，母Annabel Fallowは35歳であった。1419年にイギリススコットランドロスアンでLady Katherine Landellsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年6月にイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィックで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Lawedre(이)가 1385년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 노르스 버윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Lauder of The Bass I(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabel Fallow(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스이언에서 Lady Katherine Landells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 6월 영국 노르스벌랜드 버윅에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Lawedre nasceu em 1385, em North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Lauder of The Bass I, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Annabel Fallow, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Katherine Landells em 1419, em Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1421, em Berwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Lawedre родился в 1385 г. в местности норт бирвикк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Lauder of The Bass I было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabel Fallow, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Katherine Landells в 1419 г. в местности лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер июнь 1421 г. в местности бирвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Lawedre nació en 1385, en North Berwick, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Lauder of The Bass I, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Annabel Fallow, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lady Katherine Landells en 1419, en Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en junio de 1421, en Berwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
